settings.title: Where comfort meets the city.
settings.subtitle: A 5-star urban retreat above the streets of Midtown — quiet rooms, considered service, and a view that has not gotten old in ninety-eight years.

settings.heading: What you can expect, every time.
settings.description: No upsells. No surprises. Everything below is included with every reservation, in every room.

amenities.title: Prime Midtown Location
amenities.desc: Two blocks from Bryant Park, six from Times Square, a short walk to Central Park.

amenities.title: 24/7 Concierge
amenities.desc: Reservations, theater, transportation — handled before you think to ask.

amenities.title: Egyptian Cotton Linens
amenities.desc: 600-thread-count sheets, down pillows, and a curated pillow menu in every room.

amenities.title: 1 Gbps Wi-Fi
amenities.desc: Symmetric fiber across the property — fast enough for the largest team call.

amenities.title: Rooftop Lounge & Pool
amenities.desc: A heated infinity pool, a quiet bar, and the best view of the skyline at sunset.

amenities.title: Spa & Fitness
amenities.desc: A full Technogym floor, two studios, and a six-treatment spa one level below.

settings.heading: Inside the building.
settings.description: A look at the spaces — the lobby, the rooftop, the rooms, the bar.

testimonials.quote: The Meridian is the only hotel in Manhattan that gets the small things right. Quiet rooms, real coffee, and a front desk that remembers your name on the second visit.
testimonials.name: Eleanor Whitfield

testimonials.quote: Booked the Executive Studio for a four-night sprint. The desk is real, the chair is real, and the wifi is faster than my office. I extended by two days.
testimonials.name: Marcus Tan

testimonials.quote: We travel with three kids under ten. The Family Suite was the first hotel room that didn’t feel like a compromise. The kids had their own door. We had ours.
testimonials.name: The Alvarez Family

settings.heading: Ready to book your stay?
settings.description: Whether it is one night or one week, every stay at The Meridian begins with a conversation. Reach out — we will take care of the rest.
